items.title: 5 Dividend Powerhouses That Belong in Every Retirement Portfolio Right Now
items.description: For investors approaching or in retirement, the right stock portfolio balances reliable income, low volatility, and consistent dividend growth. Among six prominent dividend-paying stocks, five stand out for their financial stability, income generation, and defensive characteristics that help retirees navigate market turbulence.
